subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of guidance and the light of Abraham! When the obstinate Nimrod sought to annihilate that Essence of being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقتبس از نار هدی و نور ابراهیم نمرود عنود چون آن جوهر وجود را خواست محو و
subcodes.subjects: @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
